name: Drawer
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Drawer primitive composed from the local Dialog lifecycle, preserving model-owned open state, modal commands, focus and dismiss behavior, Drawer popup/content data attributes, placement direction, and model-owned indent activity.

registry.reason: Drawer reuses the local Dialog primitive for modal lifecycle, portal, focus, Escape, outside dismiss, aria labeling, and scroll lock commands.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, Command, and message-facing APIs for the Foldkit-native primitive.
Provides Effect Schema for serializable Drawer options and variants.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Drawer primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
Origin Base UI React Drawer primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Drawer delegates modal lifecycle, portal, focus, Escape, outside dismissal, ARIA labeling, and scroll lock commands to the local Dialog primitive.
deviations.rationale: Plan 055 requires Drawer to reuse Dialog behavior instead of forking modal infrastructure.

deviations.summary: Open state is a model-owned input and user interactions emit open-change facts instead of mutating internal component state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit preserves unidirectional data flow. Consumers update their model and return command helpers in response to DrawerOpenChange payloads.

deviations.summary: Provider activity for Indent and IndentBackground is represented with a model-owned hasActiveDrawer input that defaults to the drawer open state.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit registry primitives cannot hide provider mutation; the consuming model supplies the nearest-provider activity fact.

deviations.summary: Swipe direction, expanded state, swiping state, and swipe CSS variables are exposed as deterministic attributes, while pointer/touch drag physics are not implemented in this slice.
deviations.rationale: Plan 055 focuses on modal lifecycle reuse, structure, direction, ARIA, data attributes, and parity fixtures. Touch gesture physics would require a broader interaction subsystem.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native Base UI Drawer primitive composed from the local Dialog lifecycle, preserving model-owned open state, modal commands, focus and dismiss behavior, Drawer popup/content data attributes, placement direction, and model-owned indent activity.
